🧑‍🏫

Hi, I'm Tudas 👋

I'm a passionate tutor based in Sydney, helping students from Year 7 through to Year 12 build real confidence and skills — not just memorise answers. I believe every student learns differently, and I tailor every session to fit them. Whether it's breaking down a tough Biology concept or building essay writing skills from scratch, I meet students exactly where they are.

50+
Students Helped
4 Yrs
Experience
98%
Would Recommend

What I Teach

From foundational skills to HSC excellence — I cover the subjects that matter most.

  • 📐
    Maths (Year 7–10)
    Building number sense and problem-solving skills
  • 📖
    English (Year 7–10)
    Reading, writing, and critical analysis
  • 🔬
    Science (Year 7–10)
    Curiosity-led learning across all science strands
  • 🧬
    Biology (Year 11–12)
    HSC Biology with a focus on exam technique
  • 💼
    Business Studies (Year 11–12)
    From theory to real-world application
  • 🏃
    PDHPE (Year 11–12)
    Core concepts made simple and memorable
  • ⭐
    OC & Selective School Prep
    Targeted practice to give students an edge

Real results, real confidence. Here's what parents tell me.

Simple, transparent pricing

No hidden fees. No lock-in contracts. Just great tutoring at fair rates.

Casual
Pay as you go. No commitment.
$75 /hr
  • 1-on-1 personalised session
  • Tailored lesson plan
  • Session notes & resources
Book Now
Most Popular
Regular
4 sessions/month bundle.
$65 /hr
  • Everything in Casual
  • Monthly progress updates
  • Priority booking
Book Now
Intensive
8+ sessions/month.
$55 /hr
  • Everything in Regular
  • Exam prep focus
  • Parent check-in calls
Book Now

How it works

Three simple steps to real, lasting progress.

  1. 1
    Book a free 15-min call

    We'll chat about your child's needs, goals, and what's not clicking right now.

  2. 2
    Get a tailored plan

    I'll design sessions around their exact syllabus, gaps, and learning style.

  3. 3
    Watch them grow

    Consistent sessions, real progress, and genuine confidence — not just better marks.

🗺️

100% Online — anywhere in Australia.

Sessions run via Zoom with a shared digital whiteboard. All resources, worksheets, and notes are provided — no printing, no travel, no hassle. Just great learning from the comfort of home.

  • 📍 Sydney-based
  • 🖥️ Zoom sessions
  • 📋 Resources included
  • 🇦🇺 Australia-wide

Ready to get started?

Book a free 15-minute discovery call — no pressure, no commitment. Just a friendly chat.

Thanks! I'll be in touch within 24 hours 😊
